hero.heading: The electrolyte mix for strength training
hero.subtext: Finally, a formula built for the gym — not the marathon.

reframe.heading: Not all training is the same
reframe.enduranceBody: 500–1,000mg sodium. 11–21g sugar. 0mg magnesium. Most mixes are built for hours of cardio sweat — not for what happens in the weight room.
reframe.strengthBody: 234mg sodium. 0 sugar. 120mg magnesium for force output. 10mg zinc for recovery. 1g taurine for muscle performance. Dosed for resistance training.
reframe.closing: Dosed for what resistance training actually demands.

magnesium.title: Magnesium
magnesium.desc: Supports force output and energy production. 32% of your daily value.

zinc.title: Zinc
zinc.desc: Supports recovery and protein synthesis. 100% of your daily value.

taurine.title: Taurine
taurine.desc: 1,000mg to support muscle performance during training.

science.heading: Backed by research, not marketing
science.body: Every ingredient at a dose that matters. Every health claim authorised by the European Food Safety Authority. Formula validated by independent university research.
points: EFSA-authorised health claims on magnesium, zinc, and potassium
All minerals within EU Tolerable Upper Intake Levels — even at 2 servings per day
Independent university validation of the complete formula
